title: dactylorchis occidentalis
intro: Dactylorchis occidentalis, also known as the Western Spiranthes or Ladies' Tresses, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dactylorchis occidentalis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. Dactylorchis occidentalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
